headline: The Surprising Dow Stock That Has Outperformed Nvidia by 2-to-1
summary: While Wall Street fixated on artificial intelligence chips and soaring tech valuations, one blue-chip Dow name delivered returns that left Nvidia (NASDAQ:NVDA) in the dust. Over the past year, Caterpillar (NYSE:CAT) shares have risen 104%, more than double Nvidia’s 50% gain. That outperformance came not from flashy semiconductors, but from yellow machines moving dirt for ... The Surprising Dow Stock That Has Outperformed Nvidia by 2-to-1

headline: What if stability returns? Evercore names stocks to watch
summary: Investing.com -- Investors have been so focused on hedging against further deterioration — from the ongoing U.S./Israel-Iran conflict to oil prices, credit stress, and rate uncertainty — that they may be unprepared for a stabilizing macro backdrop, Evercore ISI says.
